title: MCCI Greeter
description: AutoGG and AutoGLHF for MCC: Island. Supports custom messages!
body:
# MCC: Island Greeter

AutoGG and AutoGLHF for the MCC Island server.

Messages are customizable and include an "uplifting" preset.

## Supported & Tested game
* Hole in the Wall
* To Get To The Other Side
* Battle Box
* Sky Battle
* Parkour Warrior Survivor
